question: Give me all the offices in usa
generated_sql: SELECT * FROM offices WHERE country = 'USA'
ground_truth_sql: SELECT * FROM offices WHERE country = 'USA';

question: Find all employees who work in the San Francisco office
generated_sql:
SELECT e.employeeNumber, e.lastName, e.firstName, e.email
FROM employees e
JOIN offices o ON e.officeCode = o.officeCode
WHERE o.city = 'San Francisco'
ground_truth_sql: SELECT e.* FROM employees e JOIN offices o ON e.officeCode = o.officeCode WHERE o.city = 'San Francisco';

question: What is the total payment amount received from all customers?
generated_sql: SELECT SUM(amount) AS totalPaymentAmount FROM payments
ground_truth_sql: SELECT SUM(amount) AS totalPayments FROM payments;

question: all orders that are currently shipped

ground_truth_sql: SELECT * FROM orders WHERE status = 'Shipped';

question: how many customers are from France
generated_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM customers WHERE country = 'France'

question: who's the employee with the highest employee number
generated_sql: SELECT employeeNumber, lastName, firstName FROM employees ORDER BY employeeNumber DESC LIMIT 1

question: give me customers with a credit limit more than 100000

SELECT customerNumber, customerName, creditLimit

question: what is the profit margin (MSRP minus buyPrice) for each product
generated_sql: SELECT productCode, productName, (MSRP - buyPrice) AS profitMargin FROM products
ground_truth_sql: SELECT productName, productCode, (MSRP - buyPrice) AS profitMargin FROM products;

question: Show all distinct product lines
generated_sql: SELECT DISTINCT productLine FROM products
ground_truth_sql: SELECT DISTINCT productLine FROM productlines;

question: give me number of orders for every customer
generated_sql:
SELECT c.customerNumber, c.customerName, COUNT(o.orderNumber) AS orderCount
FROM customers c
LEFT JOIN orders o ON c.customerNumber = o.customerNumber
GROUP BY c.customerNumber, c.customerName
ORDER BY orderCount DESC
ground_truth_sql: SELECT customerNumber, COUNT(orderNumber) AS orderCount FROM orders GROUP BY customerNumber;

question: Find all employees and their managers
generated_sql:
SELECT e.employeeNumber, e.firstName, e.lastName, m.first e
LEFT JOIN employees m ON e.reportsTo = m.employeeNumber
ground_truth_sql: SELECT e.firstName, e.lastName, m.firstName AS managerFirstName, m.lastName AS managerLastName FROM employees e LEFT JOIN employees m ON e.reportsTo = m.employeeNumber;

question: total revenue from each order
generated_sql:
SELECT o.orderNumber, SUM(od.quantityOrdered * od.priceEach) AS totalRevenue
FROM orders o
JOIN orderdetails od ON o.orderNumber = od.orderNumber
GROUP BY o.orderNumber
ORDER BY totalRevenue DESC
ground_truth_sql: SELECT orderNumber, SUM(quantityOrdered * priceEach) AS totalRevenue FROM orderdetails GROUP BY orderNumber;

question: products that have low stock less than 500 units
generated_sql:
SELECT productCode, productName, quantityInStock
FROM products

ground_truth_sql: SELECT productCode, productName, quantityInStock FROM products WHERE quantityInStock < 500;

ground_truth_sql: SELECT c.customerName, e.firstName AS salesRepFirstName, e.lastName AS salesRepLastName FROM customers c LEFT JOIN employees e ON c.salesRepEmployeeNumber = e.employeeNumber;

question: Count the number of employees in each office

orderCount

question: average order value across all orders
generated_sql:
SELECT.orderNumber, SUM(od.quantityOrdered * od.priceEach) AS orderTotal
    FROM orders o
    JOIN orderdetails od ON o.orderNumber = od.orderNumber
    GROUP BY o.orderNumber
) AS orderTotals

question: show me the details of the most expensive order by total value

SELECT o.orderNumber, o.orderDate, c.customerName, SUM(od.quantityOrdered * od.priceEach) AS totalValue
FROM orders o

ORDER BY totalValue DESC

question: products that have been ordered more than 1000 times in total

question: Get the total revenue generated by each customer

SELECT c.customerNumber, c.customerName, SUM(od.quantityOrdered * od.priceEach) AS totalRevenue

question: total sales by sales representative
generated_sql:
SELECT e.employeeNumber, e.firstName, e.lastName, SUM(od.quantityOrdered * od.priceEach) AS totalSales
FROM employees e
JOIN customers c ON e.employeeNumber = c.salesRepEmployeeNumber
JOIN orders o ON c.customerNumber = o.customerNumber
JOIN orderdetails od ON o.orderNumber = od.orderNumber
GROUP BY e.employeeNumber, e.firstName, e.lastName
ORDER BY totalSales DESC
ground_truth_sql: SELECT e.employeeNumber, e.firstName, e.lastName, SUM(od.quantityOrdered * od.priceEach) AS totalSales FROM employees e JOIN customers c ON e.employeeNumber = c.salesRepEmployeeNumber JOIN orders o ON c.customerNumber = o.customerNumber JOIN orderdetails od ON o.orderNumber = od.orderNumber GROUP BY e.employeeNumber, e.firstName, e.lastName ORDER BY totalSales DESC;

question: the revenue trend overtime

SELECT

SELECT o.orderNumber, o.orderDate, SUM(od.quantityOrdered * od.priceEach) AS totalValue
FROM orders o
JOIN orderdetails od ON o.orderNumber = od.orderNumber
GROUP BY o.orderNumber, o.orderDate) > 10000
ORDER BY totalValue DESC
ground_truth_sql: SELECT orderNumber, SUM(quantityOrdered * priceEach) AS totalValue FROM orderdetails GROUP BY orderNumber HAVING SUM(quantityOrdered * priceEach) > 10000;

question: which offices in the EMEA
generated_sql: SELECT * FROM offices WHERE territory = 'EMEA'
ground_truth_sql: SELECT officeCode, city, country FROM offices WHERE territory = 'EMEA';

question: all products in the Classic Cars category
generated_sql:
SELECT * 
FROM products 
WHERE productLine = 'Classic Cars'
ground_truth_sql: SELECT productCode, productName, buyPrice, MSRP FROM products WHERE productLine = 'Classic Cars';

question: groupe customers into tier based on thier credit limit
generated_sql:
SELECT 
    customerNumber,
    customerName,
    creditLimit,
    CASE 
        WHEN creditLimit >= 100000 THEN 'Platinum'
        WHEN creditLimit >= 50000 THEN 'Gold'
        WHEN creditLimit >= 10000 THEN 'Silver'
        ELSE 'Bronze'
    END AS creditTier
FROM customers
ORDER BY creditLimit DESC
ground_truth_sql: SELECT customerNumber, customerName, creditLimit, CASE WHEN creditLimit < 25000 THEN 'Low' WHEN creditLimit BETWEEN 25000 AND 75000 THEN 'Medium' WHEN creditLimit > 75000 THEN 'High' END AS creditTier FROM customers;

question: how many orders did each customer make and their name
generated_sql:
SELECT c.customerNumber, c.customerName, COUNT(o.orderNumber) AS orderCount
FROM customers c
LEFT JOIN orders o ON c.customerNumber = o.customerNumber
GROUP BY c.customerNumber, c.customerName
ORDER BY orderCount DESC
ground_truth_sql: SELECT c.customerNumber, c.customerName, COUNT(o.orderNumber) AS orderCount FROM customers c LEFT JOIN orders o ON c.customerNumber = o.customerNumber GROUP BY c.customerNumber, c.customerName;

question: whats the avrage quantity ordered per order line
generated_sql:
SELECT AVG(quantityOrdered) AS averageQuantity
FROM orderdetails
ground_truth_sql: SELECT AVG(quantityOrdered) AS avgQuantityPerLine FROM orderdetails;

question: all the employees who are Sales Managers
generated_sql: SELECT
ground_truth_sql: SELECT employeeNumber, firstName, lastName, email, officeCode FROM employees WHERE jobTitle LIKE '%Sales Manager%';

question: product code, name, and price for products priced above the average
generated_sql:
SELECT productCode, productName, buyPrice
FROM products
WHERE buyPrice > (SELECT AVG(buyPrice) FROM products)
ground_truth_sql: SELECT productCode, productName, buyPrice FROM products WHERE buyPrice > (SELECT AVG(buyPrice) FROM products);

question: tell me total credit limit for all customers
generated_sql: SELECT SUM(creditLimit) AS totalCreditLimit FROM customers
ground_truth_sql: SELECT SUM(creditLimit) AS totalCreditLimit FROM customers;

question: which orders are still in process
generated_sql:
SELECT orderNumber, orderDate, status
FROM orders
WHERE status = 'In Process'
ground_truth_sql: SELECT orderNumber, orderDate, customerNumber FROM orders WHERE status = 'In Process';

question: how much each country made
generated_sql:
SELECT c.country, SUM(p.amount) AS totalAmount
FROM customers c
JOIN payments p ON c.customerNumber = p.customerNumber
GROUP BY c.country
ORDER BY totalAmount DESC
ground_truth_sql: SELECT c.country, SUM(od.quantityOrdered * od.priceEach) AS totalRevenue FROM customers c JOIN orders o ON c.customerNumber = o.customerNumber JOIN orderdetails od ON o.orderNumber = od.orderNumber GROUP BY c.country ORDER BY totalRevenue DESC;

question: how many offices are there in each country
generated_sql:
country, COUNT(officeCode) AS officeCount
FROM offices
GROUP BY country
ground_truth_sql: SELECT country, COUNT(*) AS officeCount FROM offices GROUP BY country;

question: i wanna see the levels of employees that report to a manager
generated_sql: SELECT e.employeeNumber, e.firstName, e.lastName, e.job
ground_truth_sql: SELECT e.employeeNumber, CONCAT(e.firstName, ' ', e.lastName) AS employeeName, e.jobTitle, m.employeeNumber AS managerNumber, CONCAT(m.firstName, ' ', m.lastName) AS managerName FROM employees e JOIN employees m ON e.reportsTo = m.employeeNumber;

question: customers with over 3 paymets
generated_sql:
SELECT c.customerNumber, c.customerName, COUNT(p.checkNumber) AS paymentCount
FROM customers c
JOIN payments p ON c.customerNumber = p.customerNumber
GROUP BY c.customerNumber, c.customerName
HAVING COUNT(p.checkNumber) > 3
ground_truth_sql: SELECT c.customerNumber, c.customerName, COUNT(p.checkNumber) AS paymentCount FROM customers c JOIN payments p ON c.customerNumber = p.customerNumber GROUP BY c.customerNumber, c.customerName HAVING COUNT(p.checkNumber) > 3;

question: give me the total stock value for each vendor
generated_sql:
SELECT productVendor, SUM(quantityInStock * buyPrice) AS totalStockValue
FROM products
GROUP BY productVendor
ORDER BY totalStockValue
ground_truth_sql: SELECT productVendor, SUM(quantityInStock * buyPrice) AS totalStockValue FROM products GROUP BY productVendor ORDER BY totalStockValue DESC;

question: what is the second highest payment we got
generated_sql:
SELECT amount
FROM payments
ORDER BY amount DESC
LIMIT 1 OFFSET 1
ground_truth_sql: SELECT DISTINCT amount FROM payments ORDER BY amount DESC LIMIT 1 OFFSET 1;
